title: Doppler URI path-validation tests wrongly gated on DOPPLER_TOKEN
description: secretx-doppler/src/lib.rs:from_uri_missing_path_parts and from_uri_empty_path guard themselves with 'if DOPPLER_TOKEN.is_err() { return; }'. But the code validates the URI path (returning InvalidUri) BEFORE reading DOPPLER_TOKEN. So the tests should pass without the token — they are wrongly skipped in environments without it. — Maintenance consequence: if someone reorders the path/token checks in from_uri, these tests will still silently skip in environments without DOPPLER_TOKEN, masking the regression. Fix: remove the DOPPLER_TOKEN guards from tests that only exercise InvalidUri path-validation behavior.
